metaDescription: Route every call to the right agent instantly. Skill-based, round-robin, and priority routing with real-time load balancing. Reduce wait times, boost CX.

hero.headline: End Chaotic Call Routing
hero.subheadline: ACS ACD matches every inbound call to the best available agent in milliseconds — using skills, priority rules, and live queue data so customers never bounce between the wrong desks.
hero.visualDescription: Animated call-flow diagram: a single caller node on the left sends pulsing arrows through a central 'ACD Engine' hub that evaluates skill tags, agent availability, and queue depth, then routes to the highlighted best-match agent on the right. Subtle glow on the winning path; idle agents dimmed.

sections.headline: How ACS ACD Routes Calls in 3 Steps

steps.title: Call Arrives
steps.description: A customer dials your business number or clicks through from an IVR menu. SellSpark captures caller ID, queue context, and any CRM data attached to the number.

steps.title: ACD Engine Evaluates
steps.description: The routing engine checks agent skills, current workload, priority tier, business hours, and overflow rules — all in real time, with no manual intervention.

steps.title: Best Agent Answers
steps.description: The call lands with the right person on the first ring. If no match is available, overflow rules kick in — backup queues, voicemail, or callback scheduling.

sections.headline: Measurable Results from Smarter Routing

cards.label: Faster Answer Time
cards.description: Teams using skill-based routing report nearly half the average speed-to-answer compared to manual queue assignment.

cards.label: Fewer Dropped Calls
cards.description: Intelligent overflow and load balancing keep callers connected instead of hanging up during long holds.

cards.label: Higher First-Call Resolution
cards.description: When calls reach skilled agents immediately, issues get solved on the first conversation — not the third transfer.

cards.label: Routing Uptime
cards.description: Cloud-native architecture ensures your ACD rules run reliably, even during peak campaign surges.

sections.headline: ACD Built for Every Team Structure

items.title: Inbound Customer Support
items.description: Route billing queries to finance-trained agents, technical issues to L2 specialists, and VIP accounts to dedicated relationship managers — automatically, based on IVR selection and CRM tags.

items.title: Outbound Sales Teams
items.description: Blend inbound callbacks with outbound campaigns. Returning callers reconnect with the same rep who called them, preserving context and closing rates.

items.title: Blended Contact Centers
items.description: Balance inbound and outbound workloads across a shared agent pool. ACS shifts capacity dynamically so no queue starves while agents sit idle.

items.title: Multi-Location Operations
items.description: Distribute calls across offices or remote teams using geographic routing, time-zone rules, and follow-the-sun overflow for 24/7 coverage.

sections.headline: Works With the Tools You Already Use

content.description: ACS ACD pulls customer history from your CRM at routing time — so agents see who is calling before they pick up. Native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and 200+ platforms mean smarter routing without extra setup.

faq.question: What is skill-based routing in ACD?
faq.answer: Skill-based routing assigns incoming calls to agents who have the right expertise — such as language fluency, product knowledge, or certification level. SellSpark lets you tag agents with multiple skills and weight them so the best match always gets the call first.

faq.question: How does SellSpark handle overflow when all agents are busy?
faq.answer: You define overflow rules per queue: route to a backup team, play a callback offer, send to voicemail, or queue with position announcements. Rules trigger automatically based on wait time, queue depth, or business hours.

faq.question: Can I use round-robin and priority routing together?
faq.answer: Yes. SellSpark supports round-robin for fair distribution, priority tiers for VIP callers, and longest-idle-agent logic — all combinable in a single routing profile so you can fine-tune behavior per queue.

faq.question: Does ACD work with remote and hybrid agents?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Agents connect via browser softphone or mobile app. The ACD engine treats on-site and remote agents identically, routing based on availability and skills regardless of location.

faq.question: How quickly can we set up ACD for our contact center?
faq.answer: Most teams go live within a day. Create queues, assign skills, and define routing rules in the SellSpark dashboard — no hardware or PBX configuration required.

metaTitle: Call Transfer, Routing & Recording Software – SellSpark
metaDescription: Warm and blind transfers, ring groups, hunt groups, and automatic call recording with cloud storage. PCI-DSS and GDPR compliant for SMBs and enterprises.

hero.headline: From Call Chaos to Complete Control
hero.subheadline: Missed transfers, lost recordings, and tangled routing cost you customers every day. SellSpark gives your team one platform to transfer, route, and record every conversation — with full compliance built in.
hero.visualDescription: Split-screen hero: left panel labeled 'Before' shows a chaotic wireframe — missed call icons, a broken transfer arrow, and a red 'No Recording' badge. Right panel labeled 'With SellSpark' shows a clean call flow with warm transfer, ring group, and a green recording indicator. Animated transition draws attention from left to right.

sections.headline: Every Call Management Tool in One Place

capabilities.title: Warm Transfer
capabilities.description: Brief the next agent before handing off the customer. No repeated explanations, no frustration.

capabilities.title: Blind Transfer
capabilities.description: Send calls instantly to another extension, department, or external number with a single click.

capabilities.title: Ring Groups
capabilities.description: Ring multiple agents simultaneously or in sequence until someone answers — perfect for shared inboxes.

capabilities.title: Hunt Groups
capabilities.description: Cascade calls through a prioritized list of agents so every call finds an available teammate.

capabilities.title: Call Recording
capabilities.description: Automatically record inbound and outbound calls. Pause and resume for sensitive data segments.

capabilities.title: Cloud Storage
capabilities.description: Secure, searchable recording archive with role-based access. Retrieve any call in seconds.

sections.headline: Compliance You Can Prove, Not Just Promise

content.description: SellSpark encrypts recordings in transit and at rest, supports consent prompts, and provides audit trails for regulators. Whether you handle payment data or EU customer records, your call operations stay compliant by default.

sections.headline: Real Results from Real Teams

content.quote: Before SellSpark, our agents spent half their time re-explaining issues after blind transfers. With warm transfers and automatic recording, our 50-seat support team cut complaint resolution time by 40% in the first quarter.

sections.headline: Set Up Ring Groups in 3 Simple Steps

steps.title: Create Your Group
steps.description: Name your ring group — e.g., 'Sales Team' or 'After-Hours Support' — and choose simultaneous or sequential ringing.

steps.title: Add Agents
steps.description: Drag and drop team members into the group. Set ring timeout, overflow destination, and business hours.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Assign the ring group to a phone number or IVR option. Calls start routing immediately — no IT ticket required.

faq.question: How long does SellSpark retain call recordings?
faq.answer: Default retention is 90 days, configurable up to 7 years depending on your plan and compliance needs. You can set per-queue retention policies and export recordings at any time.

faq.question: Are call recordings encrypted?
faq.answer: Yes. All recordings are encrypted in transit using TLS and at rest using AES-256. Access is controlled through role-based permissions and full audit logging.

faq.question: What is the difference between a ring group and a hunt group?
faq.answer: A ring group rings multiple agents at once (or in a set order) until one answers. A hunt group tries agents one at a time in a defined priority sequence, moving to the next only if the previous agent does not pick up.

faq.question: Can agents transfer calls to external numbers?
faq.answer: Yes. Agents can warm or blind transfer to any internal extension, ring group, or external phone number — including mobile phones for after-hours escalation.

faq.question: Does call recording work for remote agents?
faq.answer: Recording applies to all calls regardless of whether agents use a desk phone, browser softphone, or mobile app. Compliance settings follow the agent, not the device.

metaTitle: Call Masking & Number Privacy for Businesses – SellSpark
metaDescription: Protect customer and agent phone numbers with virtual number masking. Enable two-way communication without exposing personal info. Trust-first calling.

hero.headline: Keep Every Number Private. Keep Every Conversation Open.
hero.subheadline: SellSpark call masking replaces real phone numbers with virtual numbers on every call — so agents and customers can talk freely without ever sharing personal contact details.
hero.visualDescription: Large privacy shield icon centered above a call-flow mockup. Left side shows 'Agent: +91 98XXX' and 'Customer: +91 87XXX' with red visibility icons. Center shows a masked bridge number '+91 80XXX-MASK'. Right side shows both parties connected through the virtual number with green lock icons. Subtle pulse animation on the shield.

sections.headline: Why Call Masking Matters

risks.title: Agent Harassment & Safety Risks
risks.description: When customers see an agent's personal mobile number, follow-up calls and messages can continue long after the interaction ends — putting your team at risk.

risks.title: Customer Data Exposure
risks.description: Exposed phone numbers become a data breach waiting to happen. Leaked customer contacts damage trust and can trigger regulatory penalties.

risks.title: Compliance Gaps
risks.description: Regulations like GDPR and India's DPDP Act require minimizing personal data sharing. Unmasked numbers create audit trails you cannot defend.

sections.headline: See the Difference: Before and After Masking

before.label: Without Masking
before.description: Both parties see each other's real numbers. Personal details are exposed on every call and stored in call logs.

after.label: With SellSpark Masking
after.customerSees: Business line only — agent identity protected
after.description: All calls route through a virtual number. Neither side ever sees the other's real phone number.

sections.headline: Privacy That Pays Off

benefits.title: Regulatory Compliance
benefits.description: Meet GDPR, DPDP, and industry-specific privacy requirements by defaulting to masked communication.

benefits.title: Agent Safety
benefits.description: Protect your team's personal numbers — especially critical for field agents, delivery partners, and remote staff.

benefits.title: Reduced Spam & Misuse
benefits.description: Virtual numbers can be rotated or deactivated, cutting off unwanted follow-up calls instantly.

benefits.title: Customer Trust
benefits.description: Customers feel safer sharing their number when they know it will not be misused or sold.

sections.headline: Trusted Across Industries

segments.title: Healthcare
segments.description: Enable doctor-patient calls and appointment reminders without exposing either party's personal number.

segments.title: Logistics & Delivery
segments.description: Connect drivers with customers for real-time coordination while keeping both numbers private.

segments.title: E-Commerce & Marketplaces
segments.description: Facilitate buyer-seller communication on your platform without off-platform leakage.

sections.headline: Enterprise-Grade Security Standards

content.description: SellSpark masking is built on infrastructure designed for regulated industries — not bolted on as an afterthought.

faq.question: How does call masking work technically?
faq.answer: SellSpark assigns a virtual number that acts as a bridge. When the agent calls the customer (or vice versa), the platform connects both parties through the virtual number. Neither side's real number appears on caller ID or in call logs visible to the other party.

faq.question: Can masked calls work both ways?
faq.answer: Yes. SellSpark supports two-way masking — customers can call back the virtual number and reach the same agent or department, without either party ever seeing a real phone number.

faq.question: How quickly can I get a virtual number?
faq.answer: Virtual numbers are provisioned instantly for most Indian cities. Choose your area code, assign it to a team or campaign, and start masking within minutes.

faq.question: Can I use different virtual numbers for different campaigns?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Assign unique virtual numbers per campaign, department, or city so you can track performance and rotate numbers without disrupting operations.

metaDescription: Maximize agent talk time with predictive, progressive, and preview dialers. Voicemail detection, DNC management, and real-time campaign analytics.

hero.headline: Stop Wasting Time Dialing. Start Closing.
hero.subheadline: Your reps should be talking, not listening to ring tones. SellSpark dialers automate outbound calling so agents spend up to 85% of their hour in live conversations — not staring at a phone.
hero.visualDescription: Interactive slider hero comparing two bar charts side by side. Left bar labeled 'Manual Dialing' shows 30 min talk time out of 60 min (muted colors). Right bar labeled 'SellSpark Predictive Dialer' shows 55 min talk time (vibrant gold). Slider handle lets user drag to compare; numbers animate on slide.

sections.headline: Choose the Dialer That Fits Your Campaign

tabs.title: Predictive Dialer
tabs.description: The dialer places multiple calls per available agent based on real-time answer-rate algorithms. When a live person picks up, they are instantly connected to a free agent.
tabs.bestFor: High-volume tele-sales, lead generation, and political outreach where speed is everything.

tabs.title: Progressive Dialer
tabs.description: Calls are dialed one at a time, automatically, as soon as an agent becomes available. No manual clicking — but only one call rings per agent at a time.
tabs.bestFor: Collections, appointment setting, and compliance-sensitive campaigns that need controlled pacing.

tabs.title: Preview Dialer
tabs.description: Agents see contact details and CRM history before the call is placed. They choose when to dial, with full context at their fingertips.
tabs.bestFor: High-value B2B sales, account management, and complex deals where preparation beats speed.

sections.headline: Built for Campaign Managers Who Demand Control

features.title: Voicemail Drop
features.description: Auto-detect answering machines and leave a pre-recorded message — then move to the next contact instantly.

features.title: DNC Scrubbing
features.description: Automatically filter Do-Not-Call lists before dialing. Stay compliant with TRAI regulations without manual list checks.

features.title: Intelligent Call Pacing
features.description: Adjust dial ratios in real time based on connect rates, agent availability, and campaign goals.

features.title: Real-Time Dashboards
features.description: Monitor live connect rates, talk time, conversions, and agent performance from a single campaign view.

sections.headline: Dialer Use Cases That Drive Revenue

cards.title: Tele-Sales & Lead Gen
cards.description: Run high-velocity outbound campaigns with predictive dialing. Agents talk to 3× more prospects per hour than manual dialing.

cards.title: Collections & Recovery
cards.description: Use progressive dialing for compliant, paced outreach. Preview mode lets agents review account history before each call.

cards.title: Customer Surveys & NPS
cards.description: Deploy preview dialers for feedback campaigns where context matters. Auto-log responses to your CRM.

sections.headline: See the Math on Your Outbound ROI

content.description: Plug in your team size, average talk time, and conversion rate to estimate how much revenue a SellSpark dialer unlocks.
content.note: Interactive calculator component — values are illustrative. Book a demo for a custom ROI analysis.

faq.question: What is an acceptable abandoned call rate for predictive dialing?
faq.answer: TRAI guidelines require abandoned call rates below 5% for telemarketing. SellSpark's pacing engine automatically adjusts dial ratios to keep abandonment within compliant limits while maximizing agent utilization.

faq.question: How does voicemail detection work?
faq.answer: SellSpark analyzes answer patterns — including time-to-answer and audio signatures — to distinguish live answers from voicemail. Detected voicemails trigger an automatic pre-recorded drop or skip, depending on your campaign settings.

faq.question: Can I import contact lists from my CRM?
faq.answer: Yes. Import CSV files or sync directly from Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and other CRMs. Lists auto-refresh so agents always dial the latest contacts.

faq.question: Is predictive dialing legal in India?
faq.answer: Yes, when configured within TRAI regulations including DNC compliance, abandoned call rate limits, and approved calling hours. SellSpark enforces these guardrails at the platform level.

faq.answer: Native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zoho take under 10 minutes. Search for your CRM in the directory, authorize access, and mapping is automatic for most standard fields.

faq.question: Does SellSpark support bi-directional sync?
faq.answer: Yes. Contact updates, new leads, and call dispositions sync in both directions. Changes in your CRM reflect in SellSpark and vice versa in near real time.

faq.question: Can I customize which CRM fields appear on screen-pop?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Configure screen-pop layouts per team or campaign — show deal value for sales, ticket priority for support, or any custom field from your CRM.

faq.question: What if my CRM is not in the directory?

faq.question: Is SellSpark DLT compliant for SMS in India?
faq.answer: Yes. SellSpark is a registered telemarketer with full DLT integration. We manage entity registration, template approval, and header mapping so your campaigns comply with TRAI regulations out of the box.

faq.question: How many messages can I send at once?
faq.answer: SellSpark handles millions of messages per campaign with no throttling on enterprise plans. Our infrastructure auto-scales during peak sends like flash sales or election campaigns.

faq.question: Can I personalize messages with customer data?
faq.answer: Yes. Upload a CSV or sync from your CRM, then map fields like name, order ID, or amount to template variables. Each message is rendered uniquely per recipient.

faq.question: What happens if an SMS fails to deliver?
faq.answer: Failed messages are retried automatically based on your fallback rules. You can configure alternate routes, voice fallback, or webhook notifications for failed deliveries.

faq.question: Do you support regional languages in SMS?
faq.answer: Yes. Full Unicode support for Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, and all major Indian languages. Long SMS concatenation handles messages over 160 characters seamlessly.

cta.action: Opens contact sales form or navigates to /contact?intent=messaging&action=start-free

@graph.name: SellSpark Bulk SMS & Voice Broadcasts
@graph.description: Bulk SMS and voice broadcasting platform with DLT compliance, dynamic personalization, smart scheduling, and real-time delivery analytics for marketing and transactional campaigns.

mainEntity.name: Is SellSpark DLT compliant for SMS in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. SellSpark is a registered telemarketer with full DLT integration. We manage entity registration, template approval, and header mapping so your campaigns comply with TRAI regulations out of the box.

mainEntity.name: How many messages can I send at once?

acceptedAnswer.text: SellSpark handles millions of messages per campaign with no throttling on enterprise plans. Our infrastructure auto-scales during peak sends like flash sales or election campaigns.

mainEntity.name: Can I personalize messages with customer data?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Upload a CSV or sync from your CRM, then map fields like name, order ID, or amount to template variables. Each message is rendered uniquely per recipient.

mainEntity.name: What happens if an SMS fails to deliver?

acceptedAnswer.text: Failed messages are retried automatically based on your fallback rules. You can configure alternate routes, voice fallback, or webhook notifications for failed deliveries.

mainEntity.name: Do you support regional languages in SMS?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Full Unicode support for Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, and all major Indian languages. Long SMS concatenation handles messages over 160 characters seamlessly.
